meaning: vt.解除动员,使无效,复员,使不活动
examples: Do you know how to deactivate the alarm?
How do I deactivate a network interface?
What is the best way to deactivate logging?
You'd need to show that if you deactivate those brain areas experimentally people will think more innovatively.
You may deactivate the Data Connection to your Vehicle at any time by contacting an OnStar Advisor.
